cases.scenario: Dynamic Type / font scale does not break critical layout
cases.requiredEvidence: Redacted screenshot or note for enlarged text/font-scale critical paths

redactionRules: No raw device names, serials, UDIDs, emails, access tokens, refresh tokens, API keys, passwords, PINs, session values or Supabase service keys.
Fixture product/store/account identifiers must use TASK131_* prefixes or be redacted.
Screenshots must hide personal notifications and system banners if present.
nextAction: Collect redacted operator-assisted physical Review/Conflict and accessibility evidence before full REVIEW acceptance.
